# Frothy Carwash Lounge

> Hand car wash, auto detailing, and ceramic coating in Hollywood, FL. No machines — every car washed entirely by hand, with an indoor coffee lounge while you wait. Open 7 days a week, 8 AM–7 PM. Walk-ins welcome.

Frothy Carwash Lounge is located at 2223 Pembroke Rd, Hollywood, FL 33020. Phone: (954) 510-3073. Email: info@frothycarwash.com.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://frothycarwash.com/): Hand car wash, detailing & ceramic coating overview, pricing snapshot, and reviews.
- [Services & Pricing](https://frothycarwash.com/services): Full price list for hand washes, interior/exterior detailing, and showroom packages, by vehicle type.
- [Ceramic Coating](https://frothycarwash.com/ceramic): 1, 3, and 5-year ceramic coating tiers, pricing, and FAQs.
- [Memberships](https://frothycarwash.com/memberships): Silver, Gold, and Platinum monthly wash plans.
- [About](https://frothycarwash.com/about): Company story, team, and what makes Frothy different from automatic car washes.
- [Contact & Book](https://frothycarwash.com/contact): Location, hours, phone, map, and contact form.
- [Photo Gallery](https://frothycarwash.com/gallery): Photos of hand washes, full details, and ceramic coatings.

## Booking

Appointments and walk-in service can be booked online at [Square Booking](https://square.site/book/L52E1Y2E4PK6M/frothy-carwash-lounge-hollywood-fl) or by calling (954) 510-3073.
